human:
POINTS:
- [modules/command/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/command/FluoExec.java:66] All that is advertised in the docs is that this config can be used to create a client.  I think it would be nice for the old config file to just pass it through and for the new config file only set the app name.
v5:
SUMMARY:
This PR splits fluo.properties into connection/application properties, adds new standalone CLI commands (FluoInit, FluoOracle, FluoWorker, FluoScan, etc.), and deprecates the YARN/Twill-based cluster module. Changes span +3007/-866 lines across 67 files. The diff is truncated, preventing full verification of several new method definitions referenced by command classes.

POINTS:
- [modules/api/src/test/java/org/apache/fluo/api/config/FluoConfigurationTest.java:236] Test bug — `Assert.assertTrue(applicationProps.exists());` checks the wrong variable. The variable just declared on line 235 is `connectionProps`, so this should be `Assert.assertTrue(connectionProps.exists());`. This copy-paste error means the test passes even if fluo-conn.properties is missing, while silently ignoring the actual file being tested.

- [modules/api/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/api/client/FluoAdmin.java:42] Javadoc for `setClearZookeeper` still references deprecated `CLIENT_ZOOKEEPER_CONNECT_PROP`. Should reference `CONNECTION_ZOOKEEPERS_PROP` (the new property added by this PR).

- [modules/cluster/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/cluster/runner/AppRunner.java:73] Breaking API change — `scan()` return type changed from `long` to `void`. The old method returned entry count; the new version delegates to `ScanUtil`. Any code depending on the return value will break at compile time.

- [modules/command/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/command/FluoScan.java:125] Code duplication — `FluoScan.ScanOptions` duplicates JCommander field definitions that also exist in `AppRunner.ScanOptions` (newly added inner class). Three copies of identical scan option parsing exist across the codebase. Extract a single shared `ScanOptions` into fluo-core.

- [modules/api/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/api/config/SimpleConfiguration.java:166] Visibility change — `load(InputStream)` and `load(File)` changed from `private` to `public`. This expands the public API to support incremental multi-file loading, which is functional but was not mentioned in the PR description. Verify javadoc reflects this intentional API expansion.

- [modules/core/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/core/client/FluoAdminImpl.java:78] Constructor validation removed — `hasRequiredAdminProps()` check moved from constructor into `initialize()`. Callers building `FluoAdminImpl` with invalid config now get delayed failure at `initialize()` instead of immediate feedback. This behavioral shift may surprise existing users.

- [modules/cluster/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/cluster/command/FluoCommand.java:27] `@Deprecated` annotation lacks `since` attribute and has no Javadoc explaining what to use instead. Add `@deprecated` Javadoc tag pointing users to the new `modules/command` CLI classes (FluoInit, FluoOracle, etc.).

- [modules/api/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/api/config/FluoConfiguration.java:282-292] `getApplicationName()` now throws `NoSuchElementException` instead of the previous `IllegalArgumentException` from `getNonEmptyString()`. This exception type change could break callers that catch `IllegalArgumentException` for config validation. Consider keeping `IllegalArgumentException` for consistency.

- [modules/api/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/api/config/FluoConfiguration.java:842-858] `hasRequiredMiniFluoProps()` checks both old (`CLIENT_ACCUMULO_*`) and new (`ACCUMULO_*`) prefixes for backward compatibility. Add a comment explaining why both prefix families are checked so future maintainers understand this is intentional migration logic.

- [modules/command/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/command/FluoList.java:60] Uses `FluoAdminImpl.oracleExists(appConfig)` which is apparently converted from instance method to static method in this PR. Verify the static version doesn't require connection state that was previously available through the instance.

- NOTE: The diff is truncated after ~75K characters. New methods referenced throughout `modules/command` — specifically `FluoAdminImpl.isInitialized()`, `FluoAdminImpl.mergeZookeeperConfig()`, `FluoAdmin.getConnectionConfig()`, `FluoAdmin.getApplicationConfig()`, and the entire `ScanUtil` class — are defined in the truncated portion. The PR should not be merged until these definitions are confirmed present and correct.
v6:
SUMMARY:
This PR splits fluo.properties into connection and application config files, introduces new command-line entry points (FluoInit, FluoScan, etc.) in a new `modules/command` module, deprecates the YARN/Twill-based cluster module, and adds backward-compatible property fallback logic in FluoConfiguration. The scope is large with 67 files changed.

POINTS:
- [modules/command/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/command/FluoExec.java:70] **Bug**: `Arrays.copyOfRange(args, 3, args.length);` result is discarded — the original `args` (containing connectionPropsPath, applicationName, className) is passed to `method.invoke()` on line 76. The invoked class will receive ALL arguments instead of only the ones after the class name. The result should be stored in a variable: `String[] remainingArgs = Arrays.copyOfRange(args, 3, args.length);` and passed to `method.invoke()`.

- [modules/core/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/core/client/FluoAdminImpl.java:78] **Behavioral change — constructor validation removed**: The old constructor threw `IllegalArgumentException` when `hasRequiredAdminProps()` returned false. The PR removes this check (lines removed in diff) and moves validation into `initialize()` and `updateSharedConfig()`. This changes error timing and allows constructing FluoAdminImpl with invalid config. If intentional, document this in the javadoc.

- [modules/api/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/api/config/FluoConfiguration.java:772] **Method misleading — `hasRequiredConnectionProps` only checks application name**: This method verifies only `CONNECTION_APPLICATION_NAME_PROP` but does NOT check Accumulo user, password, or instance, which are required to actually connect to Fluo. Consider renaming to `hasRequiredAppName()` or adding the missing checks.

- [modules/command/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/command/FluoConfig.java:22,23] **Unused imports**: `java.net.URI` and `java.util.Map` are imported but never used in the class body. Remove them.

- [modules/command/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/command/FluoGetJars.java:73-75] **Silent failure — no error exit**: The catch block logs the exception but the method returns normally (exit code 0). The shell script or caller will not detect the failure. Consider `System.exit(-1)` after logging, similar to how other command classes handle fatal errors.

- [modules/command/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/command/FluoGetProp.java:37] **Typo in usage message**: Prints `"Usage: FluoGetProps <...>"` (plural "Props") but the class is named `FluoGetProp` (no 's'). For consistency, change to `"FluoGetProp"`.

- [modules/command/src/test/java/org/apache/fluo/command/ScanTest.java:195] **Test assertion on wrong variable**: `Assert.assertTrue(applicationProps.exists());` should be `Assert.assertTrue(connectionProps.exists());` — `connectionProps` is the File created on the previous line, while `applicationProps` was already asserted earlier. This is a copy-paste error that makes the test incomplete.

- [modules/cluster/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/cluster/runner/AppRunner.java:73] **Breaking change — `scan()` return type changed from `long` to `void`**: Even though `AppRunner` is marked `@Deprecated`, this is a breaking change for any subclass or caller that relied on the entry count return value. If this is intentional for the deprecated API, note it in release notes or the deprecation javadoc.

- [modules/api/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/api/config/FluoConfiguration.java:377-384] **Error message inconsistency in `getAccumuloPassword()`**: When falling back to `CLIENT_ACCUMULO_PASSWORD_PROP`, the `verifyNotNull` call on line 380 references the OLD property name in its error message. If only the old property is set, the error will say `fluo.client.accumulo.password is not set!` even though the code successfully reads it. This is confusing — the error path should only trigger when NEITHER property is set.

- [docs/applications.md:57-59] **Incomplete example**: The Java example shows `config.setInstanceZookeepers("localhost/fluo")` and `config.setApplicationName("myapp")` but does NOT show setting Accumulo user, password, or instance — which ARE required for `FluoFactory.newClient()` to work. The prior version showed these. Update the example to include minimum required properties or clarify that they must also be set.

- [modules/distribution/src/main/config/] **New distribution config files not visible in diff**: The docs reference `fluo-conn.properties`, `fluo-app.properties`, and `fluo.properties.deprecated` which are confirmed absent from the base repo. Since the diff is truncated, these files cannot be verified in the visible portion. Confirm they are added and match the templates shown in `modules/api/src/test/resources/`.
